title: Kushner, Witkoff — not Vance — heading to Pakistan for 'direct talks' with Iran, White House says
summary_full: President Donald Trump said he is in no rush to make a peace deal, claiming the Iran war has harmed stocks and oil prices less than he expected.
summary_public: President Donald Trump said he is in no rush to make a peace deal, claiming the Iran war has harmed stocks and oil prices less than he expected.
